verdict_comment: Primary suspects PASS hides substantive coverage in trust-region/PPO-clip/reward-shaping dead-zone literature that was not retrieved. The candidate's core LLM-side mechanism (null-space exploration with zero penalty inside a region, sharp restoring force outside) is structurally identical to: (1) trust-region policy optimization (TRPO/PPO-clip) where the clipped surrogate gives zero gradient inside the trust region and bounded correction outside; (2) reward-shaping dead-zone / huber-like penalties; (3) constrained-MDP slack mechanisms. None of these were queried. The retrieved set covers only surface 'prompt drift' blogs and generic 'grounding' material, missing the prior art that most directly anticipates the soft-then-hard threshold analog. Source-side coverage is adequate for catenary mechanics but does not interrogate the scope-threshold nonlinearity specifically. Recommend rerun with queries: 'PPO clip trust region surrogate', 'reward shaping dead zone Huber', 'constrained policy optimization slack', 'soft constraint hard constraint barrier LLM RLHF'.
novelty_assessment: Apparent novelty in retrieved set is artifact of incomplete search; true novelty likely lower once trust-region/clip literature is considered.
